_comment_purpose: Phase F / RRG-03 diagnosis fixture — expected diagnostic envelope. This file does NOT encode a verdict; it encodes the diagnostic vocabulary Phase F will use once a real fixture run is executed.
_comment_scope: Diagnosis-only fixture. Proof status: NOT_PROVEN. Patch-Gate: NOT_TRIGGERED.

outcome_definitions.stable: Locator from step B resolves after Step A to the same byte range / occurrence as the C1 pre-apply baseline resolution.
outcome_definitions.drifted: Locator from step B resolves after Step A to a different occurrence than the C1 pre-apply baseline resolution.
outcome_definitions.ambiguous: Locator from step B matches more than one location after step A and the runner has no deterministic tie-breaker.
outcome_definitions.not_found: Locator from step B no longer matches any location after step A.

patch_gate_condition: Patch the runner ONLY if a controlled fixture run shows that, after a real partial mutation, a follow-up command resolves differently than the current dry-run path can model (observed outcome is 'drifted', 'ambiguous', or 'not_found' while the dry-run remains non-mutating and performs no post-apply re-resolution).
